notes: Phase 4/5 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Feral (cat DPS) Druid gear guide (anchor phase-5-best-in-slot-table). Tier set: Sanctified Lasherweave line. Back lists a faction-specific Trial of the Crusader tribute-cloak (Sylvanas' Cunning, Horde) as a ranked alternative to the Gunship Armory cloak. Rings/Trinkets split into two named slots with the top pick in slot 1, remaining ranked options in slot 2.
